name: Neuron
short_description: Experience the ultimate hack-and-slash adventure in a gritty, cyberpunk-inspired world with our 2D pixel art game! With a focus on intense combat and high-speed action, our game is sure to keep you on the edge of your seat. Enjoy this unique blend of cyberpunk and hack-and-slash gameplay!
detailed_description:
Unravel the Secret Of A dystopian World.

Get ready to experience a combat and story-driven cyberpunk game that features pixel art and a dystopian world. With the ability to block your enemy's attacks with the same stance and slash your way out, you will be fully immersed in an epic journey. Explore and uncover the secrets of this unique world while utilizing techniques learned from ancient times. Get ready for an unforgettable gaming experience!

overview:

A Combat and story Driven Cyberpunk Game.

-Pixel art

-Block your enemy with the same stand!

-Slash your way out

-Explore and unravel the secret of a dystopian world

-Use technique learned from the ancient time
